what_was_done: Ported UDS socket resilience to MCP memory server (Option A full port): extracted _bind_uds_socket() helper, added proactive watchdog in accept loop, shutdown-aware OSError handling, _uds_shutting_down flag. Fixed boot/wrapup indexer stuck-at-indexing bug (missing status write on empty-files early return). Commit ddc2729, 1448 tests pass.
next_steps: Verify MCP UDS watchdog works after restart (manual socket deletion test)
Optimize whisper transcription speed (GPU/quantization or smaller model)
known_issues: Plan mode exit loop - platform limitation, mitigated by behavioral rule
ChromaDB concurrent access - tests skip when MCP running, correct behavior
test_framework.py Pyright import errors for shared modules (path resolution)
